message:
[high] google-drive: pin base_url to googleapis.com and reject q/f/u

handle_configure accepted any base_url override with zero validation
(unwrap_or(DEFAULT_BASE_URL) and straight into with_base_url) — no
scheme check, no host allowlist, no userinfo/query/fragment guards.
A configure payload could redirect every Drive API call to an
attacker-controlled host before any other trust gate fired, which
is strictly weaker than the gmail / google-calendar patches already
shipped this session.

- New validate_drive_base_url() rejects non-googleapis.com hosts
  (using url::host suffix match, so googleapis.com.evil.com and
  evil-googleapis.com are rejected) unless the override targets a
  local test host. Plain http is rejected on any non-local host.
  Userinfo, query, and fragment components are all rejected because
  DriveClient builds its request URLs via format!("{base_url}/...")
  downstream and any of those components would leak or corrupt the
  final URL.
- Seven new unit tests: apex/subdomain accept, localhost http
  accept, foreign-host reject, substring-smuggle reject,
  query/fragment/userinfo reject, plain-http-on-public-host reject,
  host_is_googleapis truth table.

Verification: `cargo check -p fcp-google-drive` under
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-review-p7 cannot complete because
crates/fcp-crypto/src/hpke_seal.rs:366 still has the committed
indentation regression blocking every transitive build — same
blocker surfaced in the asana / airtable / linear commits this
session and outside this pane's domain. Google-drive diff reviewed
manually: additions are std url::Url accessor calls and FcpError
variant construction identical in shape to the google-calendar
validator from ac44d18c. `with_base_url(&base_url)` signature
preserved (client.rs:106 takes `&str`; &String coerces via Deref).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
